title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Freshworks Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Freshworks Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Freshworks Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Dhanbad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Freshworks Ventures Solutions:
Freshworks Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Freshworks Ventures Solutions!
